title: Remastered UI
description: Reworks every UI element, including buttons, the hotbar, icons, the inventory, container menus, etc. (used to be "Refreshed UI")
body:
#  Remastered UI

Remastered UI aims to Upgrade (or for some: Redesign) Minecraft's UI while still keeping a fairly Minecrafty/Vanilla look!
This Pack makes use of the best Button/Hotbar/Icon designs i came up with over the years
(Buttons design inspired by the Exposure mod's camera UI)


###  Check out the [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/refreshed-ui/gallery)

![Inventory GUI Scale 4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BozC53Fy/images/67d9442a3057a09392f9f8e84ded92c883483410.png)
